title: One Step to Eternity
writer: Patricia McGerr, Henri Decoin, Jean de Baroncelli
actors: Danielle Darrieux, Michel Auclair, Corinne Calvet
plot: Francois Roques, a power-and-money-mad editor of a Paris newspaper (who justifies his actions by calling attention to his poverty-stricken childhood), invites four women to a housewarming at his penthouse apartment. He plans on on...
